name: HWM_TM_AUDIT_ATRBS
description: The Time change audit attributes(TAA) table stores one row for each change of an attribute for a time entry.

columns.Name: TM_AUDIT_ATRB_ID
columns.Comments: Primary Key column containing a random generated number

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: TM_AUDIT_ID
columns.Comments: Reference to a row of the Time audit table

columns.Name: ACTION_TYPE
columns.Comments: Action performed on the attribute

columns.Name: REASON_CODE
columns.Comments: Code referencing a Lookup value

columns.Name: TM_ATRB_FLD_ID
columns.Comments: Id of the Time attribute updated if ACTION_TYPE = Update

columns.Name: TM_ATTRIBUTE_TYPE
columns.Comments: Type of the attribute : Number, Varchar, Timestamp, Date

columns.Name: OLD_TIMESTAMP
columns.Comments: if ACTION_TYPE = Update and ATTRIBUTE_TYPE = Timestamp,Timestamp value of the attribute before change

columns.Name: OLD_ZONE_TYPE
columns.Comments: if ACTION_TYPE = Update and ATTRIBUTE_TYPE = Timestamp, contain the type of time zone for the value of the attribute before change. Possible values : OFFSET, ZONE, NULL

columns.Name: OLD_GMT_OFFSET
columns.Comments: if ACTION_TYPE = Update and ATTRIBUTE_TYPE = Timestamp, contain the time zone offset in milliseconds for the value of the attribute before change

columns.Name: OLD_TIMEZONE_CODE
columns.Comments: if ACTION_TYPE = Update and ATTRIBUTE_TYPE = Timestamp, contain the time zone code for the value of the attribute before change

columns.Name: NEW_TIMESTAMP
columns.Comments: if ACTION_TYPE = Update and ATTRIBUTE_TYPE = Timestamp,Timestamp value of the attribute after change

columns.Name: NEW_ZONE_TYPE
columns.Comments: if ACTION_TYPE = Update and ATTRIBUTE_TYPE = Timestamp, contain the type of time zone for the value of the attribute after change. Possible values : OFFSET, ZONE, NULL

columns.Name: NEW_GMT_OFFSET
columns.Comments: if ACTION_TYPE = Update and ATTRIBUTE_TYPE = Timestamp, contain the time zone offset in milliseconds for the value of the attribute after change.

columns.Name: NEW_TIMEZONE_CODE
columns.Comments: if ACTION_TYPE = Update and ATTRIBUTE_TYPE = Timestamp, contain the time zone code for the value of the attribute after change.

columns.Name: OLD_VARCHAR
columns.Comments: if ACTION_TYPE = Update and ATTRIBUTE_TYPE = Varchar, value of the attribute before change

columns.Name: NEW_VARCHAR
columns.Comments: if ACTION_TYPE = Update and ATTRIBUTE_TYPE = Varchar, value of the attribute after change

columns.Name: OLD_DATE
columns.Comments: if ACTION_TYPE = Update and ATTRIBUTE_TYPE = Date, value of the attribute before change

columns.Name: NEW_DATE
columns.Comments: if ACTION_TYPE = Update and ATTRIBUTE_TYPE = Date, value of the attribute after change

columns.Name: OLD_NUMBER
columns.Comments: if ACTION_TYPE = Update and ATTRIBUTE_TYPE = Number, value of the attribute before change

columns.Name: NEW_NUMBER
columns.Comments: if ACTION_TYPE = Update and ATTRIBUTE_TYPE = Number, value of the attribute after change

columns.Name: ORIG_AUDIT_ATRB_ID
columns.Comments: Reference the initial audit rows when updating the reason attribute

columns.Name: ENTERPRISE_ID
columns.Comments: ENTERPRISE_ID

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: PART_DATE
columns.Comments: partition key

columns.Name: PART_GRP_TYPE_ID
columns.Comments: partition key

columns.Name: REASON_CHANGE_DATE
columns.Comments: Indicates the date and time of when the Change Reason of this audit row is updated.
